rules.actual_saved_bundle_definition: forecast rows locked before outcome and hash-manifested at gate
rules.black_box_replay_definition: historical replay with temporal cutoffs, outcome quarantine and leakage audit
rules.promotion_rule: black-box replay can support but cannot alone satisfy stable promotion
rules.stable_separation: stable exact P1-P20 outputs may not be overwritten by control-room overlay or challenger
rules.feature_embargo: exclude race-result, post-event and event-derived features from earlier gates
rules.output_labeling: always label actual saved, black-box temporal replay, open retrospective replay, or post-event forensic
